title: この胸にあふれる想いは！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way back to the academy, Kawakami
Princess and I decide to go watch a movie.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
We did it, Trainer! We got the very last piece of
bonus merch!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'd heard they didn't have many left, so I was
feeling really on edge!
choice_data_list: It's great that we were in time!
It's great that we were in time!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Totally! I love Princess Fighter too much to miss
the chance at getting this merch!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Whaaaat?! No way!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh, if it isn't Biko! What's the matter?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Hey, Kawakami! Did you two come to see Princess Fighter vs. Carrot Ranger too?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. There was no way I'd miss this dream
matchup between princess and hero!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: I know, right?! I don't think any fan would!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Only problem is... they ran out of the bonus
merch. I was really looking forward to getting
one...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh my! In that case, you can have mine.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
A-are you sure that's okay?! You really wanted
one too, didn't you?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It's no problem at all. It's only natural for a
princess to look out for the younger students!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Whoaaa! Thanks so much, Kawakami! I'll treasure
this forever!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Now then, no movie viewing is complete without
popcorn! ♪
Excuse me, I'd like the glazed-carrot flavor,
please!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, nice! The Carrot Ranger Special! I'll have
one too, please!

text_block_list.name: Kiosk Attendant
text_block_list.text:
I'm very sorry, but we only have one bucket of
glazed-carrot flavor left.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! But glazed carrot is Carrot Ranger's
favorite!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: No need to fret! Why don't we share a bucket? ♪

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Wow, really?! Thanks so much, Kawakami!
choice_data_list: You're so nice to the younger students!
You're so nice to the younger students!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, there's no need to praise me. Such
conduct is only natural for a princess!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After the movie finishes, we make our way home.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: WAAAAH! That! Was! AMAAAZIIING!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Princess Fighter is the absolute strongest!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: S-stop crying! What if your eyeballs fall out?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But... but... it was so emotionally moving! Seeing
Princess Fighter on that massive screen! It was so
dazzling!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Sob... I won't forget this day for the rest of my life!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what should we do, Trainer?! It doesn't look
like Kawakami can stop!
choice_data_list: Those tears don't suit a princess, you know!
Those tears don't suit a princess, you know!
Just let her get it all out of her system.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what should we do, Trainer?! It doesn't look
like Kawakami can stop!
choice_data_list: Those tears don't suit a princess, you know!
Those tears don't suit a princess, you know!
Just let her get it all out of her system.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's right! A real hero overcomes their tears
and presses onward!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hic! H... huh?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, but how am I supposed to suppress all these feelings?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm so overcome with emotions, I feel like I could
tear apart anything I lay my hands on!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
choice_data_list:
If you need to let out your feelings, running's
the best way!

If you need to let out your feelings, running's
the best way!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Sounds like a plan! I'll even run with you!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, the evening sun is so beautiful. This is no
doubt the kind of scenery Princess Fighter wanted
to protect.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Definitely! And Carrot Ranger was fighting right
alongside her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After running vigorously for a while, the two seem
to have entered a state of mental bliss. Their
passionate friendship deepens even further!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hic... Thank you! BWAAAAGH!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hic... Hic...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Siiiigh!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Have you calmed down, Kawakami?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I feel so refreshed! It's just like they say in
Princess Fighter: "Tears are the sweat of the
heart—the more you shed, the stronger you
become!"
choice_data_list: That means you grew stronger just now!
That means you grew stronger just now!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Gasp! You're right! I've just taken another step on the path to becoming the mightiest princess!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! You two seem just like the real Princess
Fighter and Legendary Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, please don't say anything to make me
happier! I could end up kicking this bench and
splitting it in two!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess looks liable to burst at any
moment, so I frantically try to calm her down
before any damage is done.
